---
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: print
    logo: images/ocs-transparent.png
    theme: [ocs.scss]
    transition: fade            # ← global
    transition-speed: slow
    auto-play-media: false
    view-distance: 100
    mobile-view-distance: 100
    fig-cap-location: top        # ← nombre correcto
    scrollable: false
editor: source
bibliography: input/book-ocs.bib
lang: es
---


# {data-background-color="#ffffff"}

::: columns
::: {.column width="15%"}
![](images/ocs-old.jpg)


![](images/bigsss.png)
:::

::: {.column .column-right width="80%" }

## **Two decades of changes in social cohesion in Latin America (2004-2023)** {style="text-align: right;"}

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<div style="font-size: 25px; text-align: right;">

**Juan Carlos Castillo, Julio Iturra, Gabriel Cortés & Tomás Urzúa**

</div>

<br>

<div style="font-size: 25px; text-align: right;">

**Department of Sociology, Universidad de Chile**  

</div>

<br>

<div style="font-size: 23px; text-align: right;">

Universität Bremen

07th April, 2026

</div>

:::
::::

{{< include paper-la.qmd >}}
